name: M16A1 || Life is going so fast.
description:
"As I watch the leaves turn yellow and fall, and the snowflakes gently glide to the floor... I overthink on how... not everything is infinite. Not us, not anything."

i dont have anything to add, really.

kinda was my thoughts last night after getting off my flight

apparently (according to the description before this) it was supposed to be an m16a1 token remaster but i guess its not it.

every once in a while i get these nostalgic episodes where i just lose motivation to do anything but think of the past.

its mostly my self loathing that gets me but its also the fact that i just think that the past is just so much better than now? (then again i was in a horrible state from the ages of 13-17)

im not a really good talker (i was really shy for most of my life, and still am) so i dont really know how to put this all into words hehe

i guess this is just a lesson to cherish what’s happening now because you’re not infinite, and to take any opportunity you can.

enjoy the bot
creator: RedActual
